title: pleurothallis disticha
intro: Pleurothallis disticha is a type of orchid plant species, belonging to the family Orchidaceae, commonly found in the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits associated with Pleurothallis disticha include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made by drying the leaves and flowers, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
